decision_title: Confirm coverage of illegal chicken farm inspections
evidence_quotes: Confirm whether inspections of illegal chicken farms will be covered.

decision_title: Incorporate Petition Data from LDCC
evidence_quotes: Incorporate data from the "Livestock Disease Control Center (LDCC), Agriculture Department"

decision_title: Discuss data provision with LDCC
evidence_quotes: Follow-up discussions will be held with the LDCC regarding the data they can provide.

decision_title: Epidemic Geographical Query function
evidence_quotes: In the event of an outbreak, the system should allow queries within a 3–5 km radius, displaying epidemic prevention details such as the livestock types and quantities of each farm.

decision_title: On-site staff responsible for data entry (2 years)
evidence_quotes: On-site staff will be responsible for data entry for two years.

decision_title: System handover to business unit for self-maintenance
evidence_quotes: Afterwards, the system will be handed over to the business unit for self-maintenance.

decision_title: Data Cross-Referencing capabilities
evidence_quotes: Enable cross-referencing capabilities among the geographic distribution of petition numbers, locations of non-open type livestock sheds, river basin distributions, and pig/chicken livestock farm data.

decision_title: LDCC requirements can be integrated
evidence_quotes: Requirements from the LDCC (including violations, disinfection, and drug administration management) can be integrated into this platform.

decision_title: Read-only access for township office personnel
evidence_quotes: Open read-only access to township office personnel

decision_title: Appeal channel for data errors
evidence_quotes: provide an appeal channel for reporting data errors.

decision_title: Download User Operations Log records
evidence_quotes: Add a feature to download log records.

decision_title: Paginate multiple penalty records by date
evidence_quotes: When multiple penalty records exist, the detailed view must paginate them by date.

decision_title: Case Officer to provide homepage layout design
evidence_quotes: The Case Officer will provide the layout design.

decision_title: Homepage content must fit without scrolling
evidence_quotes: The content must fit within a single page without requiring the user to scroll.

decision_title: Begin UI design
evidence_quotes: Begin UI design

decision_title: Provide 2 to 3 UI design drafts for client confirmation
evidence_quotes: Provide 2 to 3 drafts for the client's confirmation

decision_title: Frontend development dependent on UI approval
evidence_quotes: frontend development will commence only after approval

evidence_quotes: Begin API development ahead of schedule.
